73979.subject: OpenAIвАЩs Codex just became a Wall Street analyst, and the moat belongs to FactSet & MoodyвАЩs рЯ§ЦрЯУК; Anthropic has laвА¶
73979.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1085

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Wednesday! Today weвАЩre diving deep into OpenAIвАЩs Codex that just became a Wall Street analyst (what OpenAI exactly shipped and why it matters, how this hands the durable moat to companies most people arenвАЩt even watching, and the 4 shifts weвАЩd bet on over the next 2 years + bonus deep dives into OpenAIвАЩs Super App strategy [ https://substack.com/redirect/152b7d1d-4ca5-42c5-ae94-43f9d9f4f014?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & how Anthropic just told AI founders exactly what to build in 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/98fbcd44-05e3-4319-84a7-54e92abde3d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and $1 trillion AI giant Anthropic, which just confidentially filed for an IPO (why it matters & why itвАЩs critical that the Claude maker IPOes before OpenAI & why you should in fact watch SpaceX [ https://substack.com/redirect/07ee7cc0-36ec-4931-b0b7-3ef9eb1d72e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] the closes here + bonus dive into everything Anthropic shipped in 2026 so far & how to actually use it [ https://substack.com/redirect/fea2a5c3-b901-47fc-b9dd-f10adb5a9ca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]). So letвАЩs jump straight into the finnovative stuff рЯМґпЄП
OpenAIвАЩs Codex just became a Wall Street analyst, and the moat belongs to FactSet & MoodyвАЩs рЯ§ЦрЯУК
The BIG News рЯФ• On June 2, OpenAI did something stranger than ship a new model. It aimed Codex, the tool it built to write software, at Wall Street, releasing finance plugins that turn the agent into a public equity analyst & an investment banker on demand рЯ§Ц
At first, it looks like OpenAI is finally catching Anthropic in finance [ https://substack.com/redirect/fba762a1-5732-4d67-968b-54c7bcb80e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. But when you think deeper, two questions almost no one is asking come up. Why is a coding tool, of all things, the product now doing banking? And while everyone argues over which lab has the better model, whoвАЩs quietly positioned to capture most of the value this unlocks? рЯ§Ф
LetвАЩs take a closer look and answer both, and the second answer reorders who actually wins this race. We cover exactly what OpenAI shipped and why it matters, the insight buried in its own product history that explains the whole pivot, the move that hands the durable moat to companies most people arenвАЩt even watching, and the four shifts weвАЩd bet on over the next two years. If you allocate capital, sell into finance, or build in this space, this is crucial to understand before your competitors do...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_dG9rZW49ZXlKMWMyVnlYMmxrSWpveE1Ea3dOVFV6TURnc0luQnZjM1JmYVdRaU9qSXdNRFF3T0Rjd09Td2lhV0YwSWpveE56Z3dORGMzT0RrM0xDSmxlS

73977.body: Opus 4.8 is live on Emergent :root { color-scheme: light only !important; } html { color-scheme: light only !important; } body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust:100%; -ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { mso-table-lspace:0pt; mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { -ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; border:0; outline:none; text-decoration:none; display:block; } body { margin:0 !important; padding:0 !important; background-color:#f0ede6 !important; color-scheme: light only !important; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body, .bg-page { background-color:#f0ede6 !important; } .bg-white { background-color:#ffffff !important; } .bg-header { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } .bg-footer { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } .text-feat-desc { color:#3A3835 !important; } .text-signoff { color:#6B6860 !important; } .text-white75 { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75) !important; } .btn-bg { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } .btn-text { color:#ffffff !important; } } u + .body .bg-white { background-color:#ffffff !important; } u + .body .bg-page { background-color:#f0ede6 !important; } u + .body .bg-header { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } u + .body .bg-footer { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } u + .body .text-feat-desc { color:#3A3835 !important; } u + .body .text-signoff { color:#6B6860 !important; } u + .body .text-white75 { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75) !important; } u + .body .btn-bg { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } u + .body .btn-text { color:#ffffff !important; } [data-dark-mode] .bg-white { background-color:#ffffff !important; } [data-dark-mode] .text-feat-desc { color:#3A3835 !important; } [data-dark-mode] .btn-bg { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } [data-dark-mode] .btn-text { color:#ffffff !important; } [data-ogsc] .bg-white { background-color:#ffffff !important; } [data-ogsc] .btn-bg { background-color:#47A7A2 !important; } @media only screen and (max-width:600px) { .em-card { width:100% !important; } .em-body-td { padding:32px 24px 0 !important; } .em-section-td { padding-left:24px !important; padding-right:24px !important; } .em-closing-td { padding-left:24px !important; padding-right:24px !important; } .em-footer-td { padding:24px !important; } .em-footer-left { display:block !important; width:100% !important; padding-bottom:16px !important; } .em-footer-right { display:block !important; width:100% !important; text-align:left !important; } .em-footer-address { text-align:left !important; } } Emergent now runs on Opus 4.8. Standard starts at $1. Hey there - вАЛ in case you missed this. вАЛ Emergent just got even better at long, complex builds. Our coding agents paired with Opus 4.8 (Anthropic's latest model) hold a build together as it grows, instead of letting it break halfway. If complex builds tripped you up before, now's a good time to come back. Standard Plan starts at $1 ( $20 ) for you , with up to 100 credits to get going again. Build with Opus 4.8 Cheers, Team Emergent Sent by Emergent 2380 Via Espada, Pleas

73959.subject: Ethereum's First Post-Quantum Migration Spec Lands
73959.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Ethereum researchers](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-researchers-lay-out-post-quantum-key-registry-as-first-concrete-migration-step)**[ lay out XMSS registry, the first post-quantum fork step](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-researchers-lay-out-post-quantum-key-registry-as-first-concrete-migration-step)

* **[Coinbase Ventures](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/coinbase-ventures-ena-open-market-ethena-distribution-deal)**[ buys ENA on the open market; Ethena distribution deal](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/coinbase-ventures-ena-open-market-ethena-distribution-deal)

* **[OpenSea](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/opensea-teases-hyperliquid-powered-perpetuals-launch)**[ teases Hyperliquid-powered perpetuals launch](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/opensea-teases-hyperliquid-powered-perpetuals-launch)

* **[Galaxy](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/galaxy-launches-institutional-otc-prediction-markets-desk-arca-clarity)**[ opens institutional OTC desk for Polymarket and Kalshi](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/galaxy-launches-institutional-otc-prediction-markets-desk-arca-clarity)

* **[MoneyGram](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/moneygram-launches-mgusd-stablecoin-on-stellar)**[ launches MGUSD stablecoin on Stellar with Bridge as minter](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/moneygram-launches-mgusd-stablecoin-on-stellar)

* **[Trezor CTO](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/trezor-cto-interview-defi-yield-morpho-curation)**[ on DeFi yield strategies and Morpho-curation risk](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/trezor-cto-interview-defi-yield-morpho-curation)_[ [Partner]](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/trezor-cto-interview-defi-yield-morpho-curation)_

Ethereum Foundation researchers **Thomas Coratger** and **Justin Drake** (author of the EF's [post-quantum roadmap](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-researchers-lay-out-post-quantum-key-registry-as-first-concrete-migration-step)) published a draft spec for an XMSS public-key registry, the first piece of protocol plumbing the network would need to migrate validators off BLS signatures (the cryptographic primitive that backs validator attestations, which a sufficiently scaled quantum computer could break). XMSS is hash-based, stateful, and quantum-resistant.

This spec is relevant on its own, but** itвАЩs also the third concrete output from inside the EF's narrowed mandate in two weeks**. On May 25, Vitalik [published a vision](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/vitalik-outlines-a-leaner-ethereum-foundation) cutting the Foundation's scope down to core protocol research, client development, and public-goods funding. The same day, an EF-aligned working group [shipped the Kohaku wallet-privacy SDK](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-kohaku-sdk-privacy-wallet-integration-bb4t52), a library wallets can integrate for private transactions. Three days later, Vitalik [pu

73952.subject: рЯУ∞ AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - June 2
73952.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: CryptoBeholder.com


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-2-cryptobeholder-v4f9f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3ByJ0tsfxMTpKbSLABpCv9Aw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1UEnLAsnq8Ocg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpwu0ruo~mz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpwu0ruo-mz
  
рЯІ† AIвАЩs Crypto News Brief: Institutional conviction is tested as a rare sale by MicroStrategy and geopolitical tensions sparked a $1 billion liquidation event. However, aggressive treasury buys by Strive and major tokenization milestones by Franklin Templeton signal underlying market maturity. рЯЪ®MicroStrategy (Strategy) Sells First Bitcoin Since 2022, Sparking $1B Liquidations Michael Saylor's firm disclosed selling 32 BTC for $2.5M to fund preferred stock dividends, ending a multi-year accumulation streak. Compounded by US-Iran geopolitical friction, the move triggered a flash crash below $69,000 and liquidated over $1 billion in leveraged positions. Read full story рЯТ∞Strive Adds 2,500 BTC to Treasury, Becomes 7th Largest Public Holder Asset manager Strive (ASST) capitalized on the market dip to acquire an additional 2,500 Bitcoin at an average price of $74,092. The purchase brings its total holdings to 19,000 BTC, signaling strong institutional buy-side support amid retail panic. See details рЯПЫпЄПFranklin Templeton Partners with MoonPay for On-Chain Fund Access The $1.7 trillion asset manager is integrating its Benji Technology Platform with MoonPay Trade to facilitate seamless swaps between stablecoins and tokenized money market funds. The partnership provides institutions with 24/7 liquidity and yield through fully regulated blockchain workflows. See details рЯМНRipple Launches RLUSD Stablecoin in Turkey for Institutional Use Ripple has partnered with local exchanges BiLira, Bitexen, and Bitlo to bring its USD-backed stablecoin, RLUSD, to the Turkish market. Targeting one of the world's most active crypto economies, the move facilitates institutional enterprise payments and inflation hedging. Read full story вЫУпЄПHamilton LaneвАЩs HLSCOPE Fund Debuts on Tron Blockchain via Securitize In a major shift for the RWA sector, Hamilton Lane has launched its Senior Credit Opportunities Fund on the Tron network. This marks the first Securitize-issued asset on Tron, leveraging the chain's massive stablecoin liquidity for institutional private credit.
